title: La fausse maîtresse
writer: André Cayatte, Michel Duran, Tania Einenberg
actors: Danielle Darrieux, Lise Delamare, Monique Joyce
plot: Guy Carbonnel, a rich industrialist, has more eyes for rugby than for his wife Hélène. René Rivals, his long-time pal, takes advantage of it to court her but Guy is becoming suspicious so René has to find a way to deflect his frie...
